headline: Oracle’s Veritone AI Deal And Nashville Growth Add Context To Valuation
summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) has signed a multi year agreement for Veritone to run its AI solutions on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure. The company is also expanding its physical presence in Nashville with a new long term lease and plans for additional tech roles. These moves highlight growing enterprise AI workloads on Oracle Cloud and increased investment in on the ground operations. Oracle, trading at $139.66, has seen mixed share performance, with a 6.7% decline over the past week and a 5.6% decline...
